demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Roommate calling] Please help — she screamed that her stomach was tearing apart, grabbed her shoulder, and then just collapsed on the bathroom floor. She's gone really pale and sweaty and I can barely wake her up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She suddenly got agonising belly pain out of nowhere and fainted — she looks awful and I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: very sudden, about 30 minutes ago while she was in the bathroom
symptom_narrative.character: she said it was an excruciating, sharp, tearing pain low down in her belly, and just before she collapsed she was clutching her left shoulder
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever seen anyone in — she was screaming
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the belly, worse on the left side, plus bad pain in the tip of her left shoulder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once and hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: she can't bear to be moved at all
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she went pale and clammy, then fainted; now she's drowsy and confused and can't really answer me. She mentioned she'd had some dark spotting down below for the last few days, and I think she said her period was late.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before that I know of
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she's on the floor and can't get up or stand — completely unable to move herself

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young woman sharing a flat; her roommate is with her and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: she looks very pale, almost grey in the face and lips
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: roommate's naked-eye impression over the phone, not a measured observation

objective_data_offered.value: her skin is cold, sweaty and clammy to touch
she's drowsy and only just responds when I shout her name

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: unmeasured lay observation of breathing rate

objective_data_offered.value: her tummy looks bloated and swollen and she flinches if I go near it
